---
title: "Top Secret"
page-layout: full
format: html
toc: false
---

## Shoutout to the legends

Thanks to my friend Erik Fuhrmann for the help and inspiration!

Created by Santiago Alvarez-Cardenas, at the dawn of my PhD adventure, by own initiative.

![The Summary of the creation of this website ⬏](img/do_not_open/andy_meme.png)

![Erik's honest response ⬏](img/do_not_open/steal_code_meme.png)

![Me arriving to this lab ⬏](img/do_not_open/hiring_meme.jpg)

![For whoMever checks this code later ⬏](img/do_not_open/programmer_review_meme.jpg)

![Me checking the code in the future ⬏](img/do_not_open/programmers_meme.png)

![Summary of my life ⬏](img/do_not_open/what_think_do_meme.jpeg)

[← Back to serious reality](index.qmd){.btn .btn-orange .btn-sm role="button"}
